ei.headline: Growth Pairing
ei.context_note: Ei day: auspicious for career advancement
ei.detail: Best timing for promotions, proposals, and interviews. Actions yield above-average returns.

shin.headline: Nurturing Pairing
shin.context_note: Shin day: auspicious for forming bonds
shin.detail: The company is willing to invest in your development. Ideal for long-term commitments.
avoid: Using the position as a stepping stone

yu.headline: Networking Pairing
yu.detail: Your network is your greatest asset. Attend industry events and choose team-oriented companies.

sui.headline: Deep Focus Pairing
sui.context_note: Sui day: suitable for recovery only
sui.detail: Shift from expansion to consolidation. Great time for certifications and skill building.

an.headline: Foundation Pairing
an.detail: Good timing to establish roots. Joining new teams or relocating goes smoothly.

kai.headline: Challenge Pairing
kai.context_note: Kai day: only for overcoming obstacles
kai.detail: You thrive in problem-solving. Choose companies with tough challenges to tackle.

ki.headline: Internal Social Pairing
ki.detail: Direct your social energy inward. Focus on team relationships and internal networking.

sei.headline: Learning Achievement Pairing
sei.context_note: Sei day: auspicious for study and accomplishment
sei.detail: Learning and delivery are both favorable. Choose companies with strong training programs.

mei.headline: Mirror Pairing
mei.context_note: Mei day: not suitable for major actions
mei.detail: Not the time to strike, but perfect for preparation. Invest in certifications and portfolio.

gyo.headline: Accumulation Pairing
gyo.context_note: Gyo day: actions don't bear fruit
gyo.detail: Energy accumulation phase. Focus on learning and building reserves for when conditions improve.

tai.headline: Potential Pairing
tai.context_note: Tai day: not suitable for major actions
tai.detail: Take over established work and develop steadily. Your potential will bloom when the time is right.
